data.title: Revision Skincare appoints Lisa Paley as CEO to drive company growth.
data.description: Irving, TX - Revision Skincare®, an innovative skincare company, has named Lisa Paley as its new CEO.

data.title: Liberty Puerto Rico secures $250M loan through subsidiary, $200M drawn, $50M available, fixed 9.75% coupon, matures in 2030.
data.description: In Denver, Colorado, Liberty Latin America Ltd. (NASDAQ: LILA and LILAK, OTC Link: LILAB) revealed that Liberty Puerto Rico has secured a new five-year $250 million financing. Of this amount, $200 million has already been utilized, while $50 million remains accessible over the upcoming year. The financing, maturing in 2030, carries a fixed interest rate of 9.75% annually. The collateral for this facility comprises specific fixed assets.

data.title: Deepgram gains AWS Generative AI Competency, enhancing service tools. Regulations met through technical audit.
data.description: In San Francisco, Deepgram, a notable Voice AI platform, revealed today that it has secured the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Generative AI Competency. This notable achievement positions Deepgram as a distinguished AWS Partner facilitating customers and the AWS Partner Network (APN) in propelling services, tools, and infrastructure necessary for the adoption of generative AI technologies. The attainment of the AWS Generative AI Competency entails undergoing a stringent technical audit.

data.title: ECI introduces AI Assist for MobileTech, aiding office tech industry. Boosts efficiency with faster issue resolution.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, ECI Software Solutions revealed the early access launch of AI Assist for MobileTech. This AI-powered service call resolution solution, tailored for the office technology sector, is integrated within the MobileTech mobile app. By utilizing AI Assist, service organizations can swiftly and precisely address equipment problems at a reduced cost. This innovation aims to tackle major challenges, offering a faster resolution process and enhanced accuracy for resolving issues in the industry.

data.title: AllegroDVT releases tools for AV2 adoption, supporting AOMedia's codec for 2025 release; boosts AR/VR support.
data.description: In Grenoble, France, AllegroDVT, a top provider of Digital Video Technology Solutions, has unveiled a new suite of products to speed up the uptake of the upcoming AV2 codec from the Alliance for Open Media (AOMedia). This AV2 Codec, scheduled to launch by the end of 2025 according to AOMedia's announcement on September 15th, is a significant advancement in video compression capabilities. It is expected to offer improved backing for AR/VR applications and a range of other features.

data.title: DDC Enterprise buys 50 BTC, totals 1,058 BTC in treasury strategy. Market sentiment remains cautious.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited, a key player in corporate Bitcoin treasury strategy and global Asian food platform, revealed the addition of 50 BTC to its holdings, elevating the total to 1,058 BTC. Amid cautious market sentiment, the company persists in its ongoing Bitcoin accumulation strategy. With a dedication to responsibly expanding its reserves, DDC maintains its pursuit of establishing a substantial corporate presence in the crypto space.

data.title: Vesta prices $500 million senior notes due 2033 in private placement offering.
data.description: Mexico City-based real estate company Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (“Vesta”) (NYSE: VTMX; BMV: VESTA) has disclosed the pricing of an offering totaling US$500.00 million in 5.500% senior unsecured notes due January 30, 2033. Vesta, known for owning, managing, developing, and leasing industrial properties in Mexico, announced that the Notes will be issued through a private placement and resold by the initial purchasers.

data.title: Global mining equipment industry projected to reach $81.58 billion by 2030 with a 4.6% CAGR growth from $62.23 billion in 2024.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Mining Equipment Industry, Global, 2024-2030" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The off-highway equipment sector, specifically mining equipment, has seen substantial growth, with a global market valued at $62.23 billion in 2024. Analysts anticipate a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.6% from 2024 to 2030, estimating that the industry revenue could reach $81.58 billion by the end of this period. The growth is attributed to the rising demand for essential minerals needed for electric vehicles and other industries.

data.title: Bass Pro Shops and White River Marine Group acquires Hobie Water Sports brand, moving production to Lebanon, Missouri. New job opportunities.
data.description: A renowned outdoor and conservation-centered company in North America is transferring production of Hobie products from Mexico to Lebanon, Missouri. The announcement was made on September 25, 2025, in Springfield, Missouri. Bass Pro Shops and White River Marine Group revealed that they have acquired Hobie, a well-known water sports brand. This move signifies a significant investment in the Lebanon facility and is expected to create new job opportunities in the region. The decision to bring Hobie production to Missouri underscores the commitment to local manufacturing and reinforces the company's dedication to quality and innovation.

data.title: Research report on potential impact of Trump 2.0 policies in global auto industry. Highlights 25% tariff on vehicle imports.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Strategic Analysis of Trump 2.0 Policies and their Potential Impact on the Global Automotive Industry, 2025" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. On March 26, 2025, President Donald Trump of the United States enforced a 25% tariff on the importation of passenger vehicles, light trucks, and specific automotive components such as engines, transmissions, powertrain parts, and electrical components.
